sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Ship Transformation
special_mechanics.description: Player's ship can transform into three different forms: Front Offense Type (shoots enemies in front), Side Offense Type (attacks left and right sides), and Rear Offense Type (shoots from behind). Each form has unique movement and attack characteristics.

special_mechanics.name: Speed-Up/Speed-Down Power-ups
special_mechanics.description: Adjustable player speed through collectible power-ups, up to five levels of adjustment

special_mechanics.name: Ship Union/Combination
special_mechanics.description: In two-player mode, collection of combination parts allows ships to merge into a combined form for a limited time period. Player with more parts controls main shot; other player controls secondary weapon.

tier_notes: Crisis Force is a vertical scrolling shmup with no documented movement physics parameters in available sources. Documentation focuses on gameplay mechanics (ship transformation, power-up system, two-player co-op) rather than precise movement values. Tier 2 assessment reflects lack of empirical physics data.
